title: viola septentrionalis
intro: Viola septentrionalis, also known as the Northern Violet or Arctic Violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have potential in treating wounds, reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Viola septentrionalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Viola septentrionalis include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol, and can be used to treat various health conditions.
